'''wazobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadbase|roadbase]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-z-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadbase|roadbase]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| wazobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæzebeth|wæzebeth]] || [[word:wæzebej|wæzebej]] || [[word:wæzebesh|wæzebesh]] || [[word:wæzebe|wæzebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wazozoboth|wazozoboth]] || [[word:wazozoboj|wazozoboj]] || [[word:wazozobosh|wazozobosh]] || [[word:wazozobo|wazozobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wazoboth|wazoboth]] || [[word:wazoboj|wazoboj]] || [[word:wazobosh|wazobosh]] || [[word:wazobo|wazobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wazofboth|wazofboth]] || [[word:wazofboj|wazofboj]] || [[word:wazofbosh|wazofbosh]] || [[word:wazofbof|wazofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wazobotho|wazobotho]] || [[word:wazobojo|wazobojo]] || [[word:wazobosho|wazobosho]] || [[word:wazoboko|wazoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wazoboth|wazoboth]] || [[word:wazoboj|wazoboj]] || [[word:wazobosh|wazobosh]] || [[word:wazobo|wazobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wazobothol|wazobothol]] || [[word:wazobojol|wazobojol]] || [[word:wazoboshol|wazoboshol]] || [[word:wazobokol|wazobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wazobothotho|wazobothotho]] || [[word:wazobojojo|wazobojojo]] || [[word:wazoboshosho|wazoboshosho]] || [[word:wazoboko|wazoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wazobothon|wazobothon]] || [[word:wazobojon|wazobojon]] || [[word:wazoboshon|wazoboshon]] || [[word:wazobokon|wazobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wazobothoro|wazobothoro]] || [[word:wazobojoro|wazobojoro]] || [[word:wazoboshoro|wazoboshoro]] || [[word:wazobokoro|wazobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
